name: mcp-server-mcpindex
description: Discover MCP servers by natural-language task, with quality scores and an advisory trust screen (check_tool_trust, assess_server) before an agent calls a tool. The directory client for mcpindex.ai; advisory, not a safety verdict. Drop-in for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Cline, Zed.
author: Bhartis LLC <hello@mcpindex.ai>

scripts.build: node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/trust.mjs && node --check src/update-check.mjs
